chunks.en: I usually take my lunch break at noon.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい正午にお昼休みを取ります。

chunks.en: I take my break after a long morning meeting.
chunks.ja: 長い午前中の会議のあとに休憩を取ります。

chunks.en: For lunch, I often eat a rice ball and salad.
chunks.ja: お昼にはよくおにぎりとサラダを食べます。

chunks.en: Sometimes I buy a warm lunch box from the store.
chunks.ja: ときどきお店で温かいお弁当を買います。

chunks.en: I usually eat at my desk while I check email.
chunks.ja: 私はたいていメールを見ながらデスクで食べます。

chunks.en: On sunny days, I eat outside in the park.
chunks.ja: 晴れた日には公園の外で食べます。

chunks.en: After eating, I like to take a short walk.
chunks.ja: 食べたあとは短い散歩をするのが好きです。

chunks.en: After lunch, I often drink coffee and feel ready.
chunks.ja: 昼食後はよくコーヒーを飲んで、準備が整った気分になります。

outline: Opening: when I take my lunch break
Point 1: what I eat and where I eat
Point 2: what I do after eating
Wrap-up: feeling ready to work again

modelTalk.text: I usually take my lunch break at noon. Sometimes I wait until one o'clock. It's my favorite time of the day. For lunch, I often eat a sandwich. I like rice and chicken too. Sometimes I bring food from home. On busy days, I eat at my desk. But I don't really like that. I prefer the break room with my friends. We talk and laugh together. After I eat, I go for a short walk. Fresh air helps me feel good. Sometimes I drink coffee and check my phone. Then I'm ready to work again. My lunch break isn't long, but it's nice. I feel happy after it.

chunks.en: Today I'll talk about my lunch break at work.
chunks.ja: 今日は職場でのお昼休みについて話します。

chunks.en: I usually take my break around noon.
chunks.ja: 私はたいていお昼ごろに休憩を取ります。

chunks.en: For lunch, I often eat rice balls and a salad.
chunks.ja: お昼には、よくおにぎりとサラダを食べます。

chunks.en: I eat lunch at my desk most days.
chunks.ja: ほとんどの日は自分のデスクでお昼を食べます。

chunks.en: Sometimes I go outside to buy a sandwich.
chunks.ja: ときどき外にサンドイッチを買いに行きます。

chunks.en: After eating, I take a short walk to relax.
chunks.ja: 食べた後は、リラックスするために少し散歩をします。

chunks.en: So that's how I spend my lunch break.
chunks.ja: そんなふうに私はお昼休みを過ごしています。

outline: Where I eat and what I do after

modelTalk.text: I usually take my lunch break around noon. Sometimes I wait until one o'clock. It depends on my work. I'm often hungry by then. For lunch, I like a simple sandwich. I eat some fruit too. I drink water or tea with it. Most days I eat at my desk. But I don't like that much. So sometimes I go to the break room. It's nicer to sit with my friends. We talk and we laugh together. After I eat, I take a short walk. Fresh air helps me feel better. Then I check my phone for a bit. Soon I'm ready to work again.
